description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly deep blue coloration, interspersed with lighter gray and white streaks and patches. The stone has a rough, jagged surface with visible natural fractures and uneven edges, giving it a raw, unpolished appearance. Some areas show subtle hints of yellowish-brown weathering, especially along the upper ridges and corners. The texture appears coarse and granular, with no signs of artificial shaping or smoothing. Its mass and size suggest it could serve as a significant obstacle or boundary marker in an urban environment, such as a park or roadside. The stone's coloration and natural veining make it visually striking and likely to stand out against both natural and built surroundings.
description: A large, rough blue stone with jagged edges, white veining, and patches of yellowish-brown weathering. Its coarse texture and irregular shape make it a prominent natural obstacle.
description_view_0: This view highlights the broad, slanted face of the stone, showing deep blue coloration with scattered white speckles and a sharp upper peak.
description_view_1: The stone appears more angular from this side, with pronounced ridges and a mix of blue and gray tones, as well as visible layering along the left edge.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a flatter, more sloped surface with a concentration of white and light gray patches, and a subtle yellowish tint near the top.
description_view_3: The stone's surface here is more mottled, with a blend of blue, gray, and yellowish-brown, and a rough, uneven texture along the upper edge.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or boundary marker on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular veining and mottling with streaks of white and gray, and subtle patches of yellowish-brown; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished with visible natural fractures and some surface discoloration, indicating moderate weathering but no heavy erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved surfaces and manicured landscapes, but could blend with other natural stones or vegetation if present nearby.
